behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names version 0.3.13, __init__.py path, error message keywords 'cross-origin'/'refusing', ValueError type, default ports 443/80, and async/sync HTTP client integration points.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to validate but not the exact helper function name or implementation; agent must decide structure.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests call public methods (request_reconnect, stream) and check ValueError + message keywords; no assertions on internal helper names.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute subprocesses that import and call HttpClient/SyncHttpClient with mocked transports.

test_not_tautological.reason: Same-origin and relative tests require allowing the call to succeed; cross-origin tests require raising specific ValueError, so a stub cannot satisfy both.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover cross-origin blocking, same-origin allowance, relative URLs, default ports, version, format/lint.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are organized into named functions with docstrings (test_cross_origin_reconnect_blocked, test_same_origin_reconnect_allowed, etc.).

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code behavior, not structured data output.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction references HTTP client modules generically without specifying line numbers.
